face.structure: heart-shaped with a pointed chin and high cheekbones

eyes.color: stormy grey with a subtle hint of amber
details: dappled contrast and soft gradient shading in the irises
eyes.expression_effect: piercing and contemplative, conveys an air of mystery

face.expression: pensive with a subtle hint of a knowing smile

skin.texture: smooth with a few freckles scattered across the nose
skin.rendering_notes: soft-focus rendering with slight highlights on the cheeks and nose

hair.color: jet black with subtle blue undertones
hair.style: long and straight with blunt ends
hair.flow: flows gracefully down her back with exceptional smoothness
details: a few loose tendrils framing the face

character.aura: an enigmatic presence that draws people in unconsciously

outfit.design: minimalist with clean lines and a modern cut
details: a subtle plaid pattern visible only up close
outfit.fit: snug yet comfortable, emphasizing her lean frame

composition.framing: medium shot centered, focused on upper body
composition.pose: standing with one hand resting lightly on her chin
composition.gesture: fingers lightly tapping as if pondering

background.color_palette: muted shades of blue and grey with occasional bursts of deep red
background.details: soft-focus city skyline as a backdrop, symbolizing urban complexity
background.rules: maintain soft transitions between colors to echo her introspective nature
